about.title: عن شركتنا
about.body: نحن متخصصون في توظيف السائقين المحترفين والعمال المهرة لشركات اللوجستيات الرائدة في ألمانيا. يدعم فريقنا المرشحين خلال جميع مراحل العملية من التقديم إلى التوظيف.

values.title: قيمنا
values.subtitle: المبادئ التي توجه عملنا وتحدد التزامنا بالتميز
values.trustBody: بناء علاقات دائمة من خلال التواصل الصادق والممارسات الأخلاقية
values.empoweringBody: دعم المهنيين في تحقيق أهدافهم المهنية ونموهم الشخصي
values.innovationBody: الاستفادة من التكنولوجيا لتبسيط العمليات وتحقيق نتائج أفضل
values.partnershipsBody: إنشاء علاقات مستدامة مع المرشحين وأصحاب العمل على حد سواء

services.title: خدماتنا
services.subtitle: حلول توظيف شاملة مصممة لتلبية احتياجاتك
services.talentBody: خدمات توظيف شاملة تربطك بأفضل السائقين المحترفين والعاملين في اللوجستيات
services.workforceBody: حلول كاملة للقوى العاملة بما في ذلك تتبع الامتثال ومراقبة الأداء وبرامج التطوير
services.marketingBody: علامة تجارية استراتيجية لصاحب العمل وحملات جذب المرشحين عبر قنوات متعددة
services.techHiringBody: أنظمة متقدمة لتتبع المتقدمين وإدارة الامتثال لتوظيف فعال

jobs.title: فرص العمل الحالية
jobs.subtitle: استكشف فرصًا وظيفية مثيرة مع شركاتنا الشريكة في جميع أنحاء ألمانيا

cta.title: ابدأ مسيرتك المهنية في ألمانيا
cta.body: انضم إلى مجتمعنا المتنامي من المهنيين الذين يبنون مسيرات مهنية ناجحة في جميع أنحاء أوروبا. نتولى جميع الوثائق القانونية، ونقدم دعم التأشيرة، ونضمن انتقالًا سلسًا إلى دورك الجديد.

contact.title: تواصل معنا
contact.subtitle: هل لديك أسئلة؟ فريقنا مستعد لمساعدتك في رحلة التوظيف

jobs.heroSubtitle: تصفح أحدث الفرص لدينا وابدأ رحلتك مع {{company}}.
jobs.searchPlaceholder: ابحث عن المسمى الوظيفي أو الموقع…
jobs.loadError: تعذر تحميل قوائم الوظائف. يرجى المحاولة لاحقًا.
jobs.ctaBody: أرسل طلبًا عامًا وسنتصل بك عند فتح وظيفة مناسبة.

jobDetail.notFoundBody: ربما تمت إزالة هذه الوظيفة أو لم تعد متاحة.
jobDetail.interestedBody: أرسل طلبك اليوم. سيراجعه فريقنا ويتواصل معك قريبًا.

errors.photoRequired: الصورة مطلوبة. يرجى العودة إلى تبويب البيانات الشخصية ورفع صورتك.
errors.agreementsRequired: يجب الموافقة على جميع البيانات في تبويب المراجعة قبل الإرسال.
errors.captchaRequired: يرجى إكمال التحقق „لست روبوتًا" قبل الإرسال.
errors.missingDocs: لم يتم رفع المستندات المطلوبة: {{docs}}. يرجى الذهاب إلى تبويب الوثائق.
errors.submitFailed: تعذر إرسال الطلب. يرجى المحاولة مرة أخرى.
errors.photoUploadFailed: تم إرسال الطلب لكن فشل رفع الصورة. يرجى التواصل معنا لإعادة إرسال صورتك.
errors.documentsUploadFailed_one: تم إرسال الطلب، لكن فشل رفع مستند واحد.
errors.documentsUploadFailed_two: تم إرسال الطلب، لكن فشل رفع مستندين.
errors.documentsUploadFailed_few: تم إرسال الطلب، لكن فشل رفع {{count}} مستندات.
errors.documentsUploadFailed_many: تم إرسال الطلب، لكن فشل رفع {{count}} مستندًا.
errors.documentsUploadFailed_other: تم إرسال الطلب، لكن فشل رفع {{count}} مستندًا.

applicationSuccess.title: تم إرسال الطلب بنجاح!
applicationSuccess.body: شكرًا لتقديمك على برنامج توظيف السائقين. تم استلام طلبك وسيتم مراجعته من قبل فريق الموارد البشرية.
applicationSuccess.step1Body: ستتلقى بريدًا إلكترونيًا يحتوي على تفاصيل طلبك ورقم المرجع.
applicationSuccess.step2Body: سيقوم فريق التوظيف بمراجعة طلبك خلال 5-7 أيام عمل.
applicationSuccess.step3Body: سنتحقق من مستنداتك ونتواصل معك إذا لزمت معلومات إضافية.
applicationSuccess.importantBody: يرجى التحقق من بريدك الإلكتروني بانتظام، بما في ذلك مجلد البريد المزعج. سنرسل جميع التحديثات الخاصة بطلبك إلى البريد الإلكتروني الذي قدمته.
applicationSuccess.questionsPrefix: هل لديك أسئلة حول طلبك؟ راسلنا على

dpa.title: INFORMATION About PROCESSING PERSONAL DATA
dpa.subtitle: In FRAMES OF LABOR LAW REGULATIONS
dpa.section1p1: 1.1. This document was prepared by the employer in order to fulfill its obligations to inform employees, as data subjects, about the circumstances of the processing of personal data within the framework of their employment relationship with the employer.
dpa.section1p2: 1.2. This document applies to all employees in an employment relationship with the employer, including those who have concluded any agreements with the employer outside of the employment relationship.
dpa.section2Heading: 2. Processing personal data on basis law
dpa.section2p1: 2.1. Employer is authorized to process personal data employee and his family members in the future puffing range:
dpa.section2p2: 2.2. The employee acknowledges that in order to fulfill the obligation in the field of occupational medical care, the employer processes information about his health condition to the extent of assessing his health fitness to perform work under the employment contract.
dpa.section2p3: 2.3. The employee further acknowledges that in order to fulfill the obligation to record working hours for the employee under the Labor Code, the employer may process the individual identifier of the employee's attendance record.
dpa.section2p4: 2.4. The employee acknowledges that the processing of personal data pursuant to Article 2 of this document is necessary to fulfill the legal obligations that apply to the employer.
dpa.section2p5: 2.5. Processed personal data are obtained directly from employee.
dpa.section2p6: 2.6. Personal data employee according to Art. 2 this one document is employer authorized to process in the scope resulting from mentioned article and that exclusively for purpose fulfillment obligations resulting from employment relationship.
dpa.section2p7: 2.7. Personal data according to Art. 2 this one document is employer authorized to hand over institutions for the purpose of fulfilling their obligations arising from the employment relationship.
dpa.section3Heading: 3. Processing personal data from reason fulfillment contractual obligations
dpa.section3p1: 3.1. Employer is authorized to process personal data employee in the range his identification data, agreed type of work and agreed place of work for the purposes of concluding agreements.
dpa.section3p2: 3.2. The employer is further authorized to process the employee's personal data to the extent of his/her identification data, the agreed type of work, and the agreed place of work for the purposes of recording the submitted access credentials.
dpa.section3p3: 3.3. Processing personal data according to Art. 3 this one document is employer authorized to carry out for the purpose of concluding the agreements in question and their subsequent performance.
dpa.section3p4: 3.4. Providing personal data to the employer for the purposes described in Article 3 of this document is mandatory for the employee.
dpa.section4Heading: 4. Processing personal data on basis authorized interests' employer
dpa.section4p1: 4.1. The employer is entitled to process for the purposes of its legitimate interests or the interests of a third-party employee's personal data to the following extent and for the following purposes:
dpa.section4p1a: 4.1.1. phone number and the employee's private email address for the purpose of ensuring communication and providing information between employers and employees, especially during incapacity for work employee.
dpa.section4p1b: 4.1.2. use, or possibly production of a portrait photograph of an employee and its publication for the purpose of identification of the employee by other employees of the employer.
dpa.section4p1c: 4.1.3. making a camera recording of an employee in the company's entrance areas for the purpose of protecting the employer's property and ensuring security; the record containing personal data will be kept for 15 days from the moment of creation.
dpa.section4p1d: 4.1.4. execution audio recordings employee at telephone calls for purpose improvement quality services and resolution of employer's complaint procedures; record containing the personal data will be kept for 6 months from the moment of creation.
dpa.section5Heading: 5. Processing personal data on basis consent employee
dpa.section5p1: 5.1. By closing working contracts and by granting consent with processing personal data according to Art. 5 this one document provides employee to the employer consent with processing personal data for the following purposes:
dpa.section5p1a: 5.1.1. execution and use of photographs, video and audio recordings of an employee taken by the employer for internal and security purposes and for the purpose of promoting the employer and its products.
dpa.section5p1b: 5.1.2. Providing the employee's profile and data (especially CV) to third parties, namely other agencies, business partners, or customers of the employer.
dpa.section5p2: 5.2. Personal data according to Article 5 of this document is obtained from the employee himself, and is accessible to all to others employees' employer.
dpa.section5p3: 5.3. Consent according to this one article is granted on time duration working ratio employee. Employee However, the employee has the right to withdraw consent at any time.
dpa.section5p4: 5.4. Employer is authorized to process personal data employee manually or automatically through own employees, possibly through specialized companies in intermediary status personal data.
dpa.section5p5: 5.5. The employer protects the processed personal data using organizational, physical and software means of protection.
dpa.section6Heading: 6. Information about rights employees in within processing personal data
dpa.section6p1: 6.1. The employee has the right to request from the employer to provide him with access to his personal data in the form of a statement of all processed personal data in relation to the individual purposes of processing.
dpa.section6p2: 6.2. In case, that with employee believes, that employer his personal data processes in conflict with this document or with legal regulations, has law from employer to demand explanations and execution remedies.
dpa.section6p3: 6.3. Employee has law to demand from employer deletion their own personal data, if they stopped to be necessary on defined purposes processing.
dpa.section6p4: 6.4. The employee has the right to request from the employer restriction of the processing of personal data in certain cases.
dpa.section6p5: 6.5. Employee has law to lift objection against processing their own personal data.
dpa.section7p1: 7.1. In in case that employer will begin with processing personal data provided employees for purposes other than those arising from this document, immediately informs the relevant employees of this fact.
dpa.section7p2: 7.2. This document is provided to each employee in written form and is continuously available to all employees on the employer's intranet.
dpa.section7p3: 7.3. List specific intermediaries, recipients and time processing personal data are available in independent document.
dpa.consentLine: I agree to provide my data and profile to other agencies, partners, or customers of the employer or the purposes of their selection process.

section2p1aItems.i02: date and place birth, ID number
section2p1aItems.i03: place permanent residence possibly transitional residence, possibly delivery address
section2p1aItems.i13: health disadvantage and kind received pension
section2p1aItems.i14: data about health capabilities employee on performance kind work agreed upon employment contract including records of work-related accidents

section2p1bItems.i01: surname, name and native number husband/wife and his/her permanent residence
section2p1bItems.i03: name, surname, native number child, date birth
